titleStmt.title: SII 9.648: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 648. (A.R. No. 27 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE PAMPAPATI TEMPLE AT KAMPILI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1474, Parīdhāvi, Vaiśākha, śu. 1, Sō[mavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1552 April 24, Sunday (not Monday). It refers itself to the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya and records that Saṅkarasa, son of Suṅkada-Banadarasa and head of Karibēḍu, caused the construction of a shrine in the temple of the god Virūpāksha in Kampili, set up the goddess Hampādēvi in it and made a gift of land at the village of Karibēḍu, for the service of the goddess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ śubhamastu .
svasti śrīvijayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1474 neya
parīdhāvisaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu 1 sō dalu śrīmatu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīsadāśivadē
vamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgayutiralāgi Ādavāniya mū
ḍanāḍa suṁkada banadarasara makkaḷu karibēḍa yajamāna saṁkara
saru kaṁpilyamāgaṇiya virupākṣadēvara guḍiyali voṁdu
Aṁkaṇada kalamāḷige kaṭṭisi Āṁpādēviyanu pratiṣṭhemāḍi
Āṁpādēviya Āmrutipaḍi naivēdyake namma karibēḍa Āgra
hāradalu tamage vuṁṭāda vṛttigaḷoḷage haṁpādēvige ha
ttu vṛttiyanu dhāreneredu koṭevu �yo hattuvṛttige vivara vu
ttama hatu hatu koḷaga madhyama hattu koḷaga kanisa yikaḷavu
tōṭasthaḷa vokkaḷa vubhayaṁ khaṇḍugada mūgaḷada holadali
huṭṭidaṁtthā rasadhānya jōḷa nelu muṁtāda dhānyagaḷanu nō
ḍikoṁḍu hotare solage bayige solage voṁdu naṁdādīpti
hotare voṁdu bayigoṁdu vīḷaya mahānavami nava
rātri pūje danurmāsada pūje kārtikadīpāradhane paṁca
parva muṁtāda tithigaḷanu māḍikoṁḍu �yo hatu vṛttiya phala
vu Āvanobbanu dēvatāpūjeya māḍidavana voḍave Ātage
kāṇāci saladu Eṁdu voḍaṁbaṭu barasida śilāśāsana
dēvarige koṭa daśakada vivara Ārane Uttama Ēḷane madhyame kalagu
ṭṭe kaniṣṭha huligilamarada tōṭa �yo nālku sthaḷavanu dēvarige koṭevu .
svadattāṣṭaguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupalayō . paradattānapahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēca va
suṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.648 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
